name: Uberall Product Overview
heading: __MISSING__
product_overview_description:
Uberall is a robust local marketing platform created to amplify your online presence and drive customer engagement. It provides various tools for managing business listings, improving local SEO, and optimizing online reputation. With features that allow for updating and synchronizing information across directories, monitoring and responding to reviews, and enhancing search visibility, Uberall helps businesses manage their local marketing efforts. Additionally, the platform supports social media management and offers valuable analytics and insights to refine strategies. By leveraging Uberall, businesses can increase their local visibility, attract more customers, and streamline their marketing activities.

Source: G2 

Features

  • Create, manage, and optimize more than 125+ online directories
  • Voice optimization helps optimize your listings for no-search listings 
  • Has direct integrations with Apple, Google, Facebook, Alexa, and other major players
  • Allows you to claim your profile in bulk 
  • Comes with an integrated inbox 
  • Lets you use templates with customizable URLs to edit and tailor your review requests at scale
  • Comes with an AI-powered review assistant that helps you edit or approve your review responses
  • Has an in-built response library that holds templates for your teams to reply quickly and on-brand
  • Advanced Natural Language Processing helps with delivering accuracy and depth for insights you can rely on
  • Filtering capabilities and reviews view that let you easily benchmark your location and dig deeper into what is driving your score
  • Has customizable filters and notifications that can help increase your operational workflows
  • Create local and store locator pages easily 
  • Comes with a Locator API that can be used to surface your location data on your website and apps.
  • Helps manage your social media management across major social platforms 
  • Comes with an AI post assistant that helps you amplify your post’s impact

Pros 

✅Quick customer support and resolution 

✅Easy to use interface

Cons

❌Bulk editing features sometimes end up glitching 

❌Implementation issues while setting up the platform 

❌Only provides basic white labeling features and does not provide managed services

Pricing Module 

Uberall does not have a transparent pricing module. It provides its services with three basic plans. However, customers don’t seem to have any issues with their pricing structure so far. 

‍
